emails.subject: Rolling, Rolling, Rolling
emails.body: Rolling, Rolling, Rolling Hey Mama, You rolling?

emails.subject: RE: Rolling, Rolling, Rolling
emails.body: RE: Rolling, Rolling, Rolling YEA MAN......................YOU JUST SAY THE TIME........................I GOT HERE AT 6:30 A.M. AND LEFT HERE AT 8:30 P.M. LAST NIGHT...................................................... To: Cross, Ora

emails.subject: RE: Rolling, Rolling, Rolling

emails.subject: RE: Rolling, Rolling, Rolling
emails.body: 5:00 sharp--same place, same time! To: Mims, Patrice L.

emails.subject: RE: Rolling, Rolling, Rolling
emails.body: Your are suppose to say "SAME BAT PLACE",.............."SAME BAT TIME".............(Smile) To: Cross, Ora

emails.subject: RE: Rolling, Rolling, Rolling
emails.body: Your are suppose to say "SAME BAT PLACE",.............."SAME BAT TIME".............(Smile) To: Cross, Ora

emails.subject: RE: Rolling, Rolling, Rolling
emails.body: You are right...same bat time...same bat place To: Mims, Patrice L.

emails.subject: RE: Rolling, Rolling, Rolling
emails.body: I'll probably leave a few minutes early and get some ice cream by the elevators.........something strage is going on (smile)....I'm hungry........................ To: Cross, Ora
